questions.question_text_full:
Select the option that expresses the given sentence in reported speech.
Direct Speech: 'I am determined to publish my findings,' the scientist asserted confidently.

options.text: The scientist confidently asserted that she is determined to publish her findings.
The scientist confidently asserted that she had determined to publish her findings.
The scientist confidently asserted that she would be determined to publish her findings.
The scientist confidently asserted that she was determined to publish her findings.
